Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 645}If I knew we'd be trapped in our rooms, I'd have brought games or something...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 645}I'm so tired of touring shrines and stuff. All this touristy stuff is boring...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 645}*sigh* Maybe I should sneak out later to hit the arcade...[n]{f 1 1}
